message:
Add touch interaction support to feature cards and glitch effect

feature-card.tsx:
- Extracted mouse position logic into a shared updateMousePos
  helper that takes clientX, clientY, and currentTarget
- Added onTouchMove and onTouchStart handlers that read
  e.touches[0] coordinates and pass them through updateMousePos,
  enabling the radial gradient spotlight effect on touch devices
- The radial gradient now follows finger position on mobile,
  matching the desktop mouse-tracking experience

franken-glitch.tsx:
- Added onTouchStart and onTouchEnd handlers alongside the
  existing onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave, so the hover-triggered
  glitch effect activates on tap for touch devices
- Touch start sets isHovered=true, touch end sets isHovered=false,
  mirroring the mouse enter/leave behavior

Both changes are gated on trigger === "hover" to avoid
interfering with "always" or "random" trigger modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
